title: membership — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `membership_capture` is the master boolean — off means the whole module is inert. `membership_plan_slot` caps plan-catalog size per tenant. `membership_slot` is enforced via plan.max_active_members. Tier-gated features enable trial periods, multi-currency, prorated hard-cancels, gift memberships, add-on management, and extended retention. Entitlements NEVER carry `application_id` on membership rows — they resolve via the tenant's active TenantSubscription (which itself carries application_id, per hierarchy.md §2).

entitlements.description: Master toggle for the whole module. On every tier by default — a tenant on any tier can capture memberships. Off = every MembershipObserver create refuses with `MEMBERSHIP_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED`. Used to soft-disable memberships during migrations or emergency freeze.
enforcedBy: MembershipObserver.creating refuses when gate off
MembershipPlanObserver.creating refuses when gate off
Routes gate at HTTP layer via `enforce_entitlement:membership_capture` middleware alias
SDUI screens hidden when features array lacks 'membership.core'

entitlements.description: Cap on the number of active MembershipPlan rows per tenant. Small: 5 (typical small academy runs 3-5 plans). Medium: 25. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on MembershipPlanCreated; released on MembershipPlanArchived. Reconciler adjusts on TenantSubscription downgrade.
enforcedBy: MembershipPlanObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('membership_plan_slot')
MembershipPlanObserver.updating (is_active → false) releases 1 unit
TenantSubscription downgrade triggers a warning; existing over-quota plans continue to serve existing memberships but new plans refused

entitlements.description: Cap on the number of Membership rows in status IN ('pending', 'active', 'paused') per tenant. Aggregate across all plans + branches. Additional to plan.max_active_members (which caps per-plan). Consumed on MembershipCreated; released on cancel/lapse/expire.
enforcedBy: MembershipObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('membership_slot')
MembershipObserver.updating (status → cancelled/lapsed/expired) releases 1 unit
TenantSubscription downgrade freezes new membership acceptance until below cap

entitlements.description: Enables MembershipPlan.trial_days > 0. When ON, plans can define a free trial period; memberships start with a trial period before first paid renewal. When OFF (Small default), plan.trial_days must be 0.
enforcedBy: MembershipPlanObserver.creating refuses trial_days > 0 when gate off
MembershipObserver.creating refuses when plan.trial_days > 0 and gate off (defense-in-depth)
SDUI plan-form hides trial_days field when features lacks 'membership.trial_periods'

entitlements.description: Enables plans + memberships in currencies other than the tenant's default region currency. When OFF (Small default), all plans + memberships use the tenant's home Region.currency. When ON (Medium+), memberships can bind to any Region + any currency the plan declares.
enforcedBy: MembershipPlanObserver.creating refuses plan.currency != tenant.default_region.currency when gate off
MembershipObserver.creating refuses membership.currency != plan.currency when gate off (Medium+ can promote to per-membership override in future)

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables cancellation_kind='hard_immediate' with prorated refund computation. When OFF (Small + Medium default), cancel endpoint accepts only cancellation_kind='soft_period_end' (no refund; membership ends at period boundary). When ON, admin/customer can hard-cancel + trigger refund based on plan.refund_policy.
enforcedBy: MembershipObserver.updating (status → cancelled with cancellation_kind='hard_immediate') refuses when gate off AND plan.refund_policy IN ('prorated', 'full_within_grace')
SDUI cancel dialog shows only soft-cancel option when features lacks 'membership.hard_cancel'
CalculateProratedRefundOnHardCancel hook no-ops for tenants without the entitlement

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables one User purchasing a membership on behalf of another family's Athlete. The purchaser becomes primary_guardian_id even without an AthleteGuardian relationship — a special GIFT AthleteGuardian row is created with type='gift'.
enforcedBy: MembershipObserver.creating: when primary_guardian_id's AthleteGuardian.athlete_id != this.athlete_id, refuses with `MEMBERSHIP_GUARDIAN_INVALID` unless gate on AND the guardian relationship is created with type='gift'
SDUI gift-membership button hidden when features lacks 'membership.gift'

entitlements.description: Enables plan.addon_config { equipment_rental, kit_included, tournament_entry_credit }. When OFF (Small default), addon_config must be empty. When ON, admin can bundle add-ons with the plan; charged as part of the invoice on first activation + each renewal.
enforcedBy: MembershipPlanObserver.creating + updating refuse non-empty addon_config when gate off
SDUI plan-form hides addon section when features lacks 'membership.addons'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends terminal-membership retention from 7 years (default) to 10 years for SOX + tax-audit purposes. When OFF, PurgeCompletedMembershipsJob purges at year 7. When ON, purge deferred to year 10.
enforcedBy: PurgeCompletedMembershipsJob checks tenant's entitlement + uses 10-year cutoff when ON, else 7-year
GenerateMembershipStatementsJob is aware of extended retention when producing tenant-level annual statements
